detail.description:
This game includes optional in-game purchases of virtual currency that can be used to acquire virtual in-game items, including a random selection of virtual in-game items.

Collect, upgrade, and battle with iconic heroes from across Star Wars™ history, including Luke Skywalker, Ahsoka Tano, Darth Vader, Han Solo, Obi-Wan Kenobi, Yoda, The Mandalorian, and more. Experience a role-playing adventure that combines strategy, action RPG, and online multiplayer gameplay.

Enter the Star Wars universe i
detail.releaseNotes:
Hey Galaxy of Heroes fans! We have some big news regarding our Cantina Update! Here’s what you can expect to find in this update:
 
-Visual & Navigational Enhancement: Exciting changes to the cantina layout.
-Refactored Campaign: Updates to Light Side, Dark Side, Cantina, and Mod campaign mission content
-New Content: Additional rewards and 21 new battles across Light Side, Dark Side and Cantina
-Economy Changes: General updates to streamline progression and resource flow
